briefdescription.para: Initializes the Demosaic IP instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function initializes the Demosaic instance by copying the configuration data and setting the effective base address for register access. It marks the instance as ready after successful initialization.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XV_demosaic instance to initialize.
Pointer to the configuration structure containing IP parameters.
The effective base address for the IP registers.

simplesect.para: This function is used in bare-metal and RTOS environments (not Linux).

briefdescription.para: Starts the Demosaic IP core.

detaileddescription.para: This function triggers the Demosaic IP to start processing by setting the AP_START bit in the control register while preserving the auto-restart bit.

simplesect.para: The instance must be initialized and ready before calling this function.

briefdescription.para: Checks if the Demosaic IP has completed processing.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads the control register and checks the AP_DONE bit to determine if the IP core has finished processing the current frame.

briefdescription.para: Checks if the Demosaic IP is idle.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads the control register and checks the AP_IDLE bit to determine if the IP core is in idle state (not processing).

simplesect.para: 1 if the IP is idle, 0 otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Checks if the Demosaic IP is ready for new input.

detaileddescription.para: This function checks the AP_START bit to determine if the IP core is ready to accept a new frame for processing. The IP is ready when the AP_START bit is not set.

simplesect.para: 1 if the IP is ready for next input, 0 otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Enables auto-restart mode for the Demosaic IP.

detaileddescription.para: This function enables the auto-restart feature, which causes the IP to automatically restart processing after completing each frame without requiring explicit start commands.

simplesect.para: Auto-restart is useful for continuous video stream processing.

briefdescription.para: Disables auto-restart mode for the Demosaic IP.

detaileddescription.para: This function disables the auto-restart feature. The IP will stop after completing each frame and require an explicit start command for the next frame.

briefdescription.para: Sets the frame width for the Demosaic IP.

detaileddescription.para: This function configures the active image width in pixels that the Demosaic IP will process.

simplesect.para: The width must not exceed the MAX_COLS configured in hardware.

briefdescription.para: Gets the configured frame width from the Demosaic IP.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads the current frame width configuration in pixels from the Demosaic IP hardware register.

simplesect.para: The configured frame width in pixels.

briefdescription.para: Sets the frame height for the Demosaic IP.

detaileddescription.para: This function configures the active image height in lines that the Demosaic IP will process.

simplesect.para: The height must not exceed the MAX_ROWS configured in hardware.

briefdescription.para: Gets the configured frame height from the Demosaic IP.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads the current frame height configuration in lines from the Demosaic IP hardware register.

simplesect.para: The configured frame height in lines.

briefdescription.para: Sets the Bayer pattern phase for the Demosaic IP.

detaileddescription.para: This function configures the starting phase of the Bayer color filter array pattern. The phase determines which color (R, G, or B) is at the top-left pixel position.

parameterdescription.para: The Bayer phase value (0-3 representing different RGGB patterns).

briefdescription.para: Gets the configured Bayer pattern phase from the Demosaic IP.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads the current Bayer phase configuration from the Demosaic IP hardware register.

briefdescription.para: Enables global interrupts for the Demosaic IP.

detaileddescription.para: This function sets the Global Interrupt Enable (GIE) bit, allowing the IP core to generate interrupt signals to the processor.

simplesect.para: Individual interrupt sources must also be enabled using XV_demosaic_InterruptEnable().

briefdescription.para: Disables global interrupts for the Demosaic IP.

detaileddescription.para: This function clears the Global Interrupt Enable (GIE) bit, preventing the IP core from generating interrupt signals to the processor.

simplesect.para: This disables all interrupt generation regardless of individual interrupt enable settings.

briefdescription.para: Enables specific interrupt sources for the Demosaic IP.

detaileddescription.para: This function sets bits in the Interrupt Enable Register (IER) to enable specific interrupt sources. Multiple interrupts can be enabled by using a bitwise OR of interrupt masks.

parameterdescription.para: Bit mask of interrupts to enable.

simplesect.para: Global interrupts must also be enabled using XV_demosaic_InterruptGlobalEnable().

briefdescription.para: Disables specific interrupt sources for the Demosaic IP.

detaileddescription.para: This function clears bits in the Interrupt Enable Register (IER) to disable specific interrupt sources. Multiple interrupts can be disabled by using a bitwise OR of interrupt masks.

parameterdescription.para: Bit mask of interrupts to disable.

briefdescription.para: Clears pending interrupt flags for the Demosaic IP.

detaileddescription.para: This function clears the specified interrupt status bits by writing to the Interrupt Status Register (ISR). This acknowledges the interrupt and allows new interrupts of the same type to be generated.

parameterdescription.para: Bit mask of interrupt flags to clear.

simplesect.para: This should be called in the interrupt handler after servicing the interrupt.

briefdescription.para: Gets the enabled interrupt sources for the Demosaic IP.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads the Interrupt Enable Register (IER) to determine which interrupt sources are currently enabled.

simplesect.para: Bit mask of currently enabled interrupts.

briefdescription.para: Gets the current interrupt status for the Demosaic IP.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads the Interrupt Status Register (ISR) to determine which interrupts are currently pending/active.

simplesect.para: Bit mask of currently pending/active interrupts.
The returned status should be checked and interrupts cleared using XV_demosaic_InterruptClear() in the interrupt handler.
